## omqctl storage release

Release a locked item

### Synopsis

The 'storage release' command releases a previously locked item. Optionally deletes it.

```
omqctl storage release <storage> [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --delete    Delete the item after releasing
  -h, --help      help for release
      --id uint   ID of the locked item to release
```

* [omqctl storage](omqctl_storage.md)	 - Manage OctopusMQ storages
